hosp_hidden_fees.problem_signal: agents flagging resort/parking/breakfast/tax as 'hidden' OR mention of 'surprise fee' in traces

actions.action: Display the all-in nightly rate (room + resort fee + taxes + mandatory charges) as the primary price on search results and room selection, with breakdown on hover. Keep the 'room rate' secondary.
actions.tradeoff: Higher headline price may reduce CTR on SEM ads; net revenue impact almost always positive due to lower cart abandonment at final step

actions.action: Move the resort fee disclosure from post-payment to the first step of the booking funnel with a clear 'included services' breakdown.
actions.tradeoff: Minor copy work; legal may require sign-off on 'mandatory charge' language

hosp_member_rate_not_auto_applied.problem_signal: loyalty_maximizer agents complain member rate not shown when logged in

actions.action: Auto-apply the member rate the moment a user logs in — no separate 'Show member rates' toggle required. Display the elite-tier name and benefits inline with the rate.
actions.tradeoff: Small engineering effort; risk of non-member sessions accidentally seeing member rate if auth fails — keep defensive server-side check

actions.action: Show 'You're saving €X as a {tier} member' banner on the booking page with points earned on this stay quantified.
actions.tradeoff: None. Low risk, direct loyalty reinforcement.

hosp_family_room_clarity.problem_signal: family_vacationer agents flag connecting rooms / bed config / kids policy as unclear

actions.action: Add a 'Traveling with family?' filter on search results that surfaces connecting-room pairs, cribs, kids club age range, family bathroom, and bed config explicitly.
actions.tradeoff: Requires PMS integration to flag connecting rooms in inventory

actions.action: Show bed configuration icons (1 queen + 1 sofa bed vs 2 queens vs 1 king + rollaway) on every room card — not buried in details.

hosp_mobile_booking_friction.problem_signal: agents abandoning on mobile; calendar/form friction; mobile conversion < 50% of desktop

actions.action: Replace the mobile date-picker with a native mobile calendar (iOS/Android) or a scrolling date strip. Keep it in-context rather than fullscreen takeover.
actions.tradeoff: Engineering effort; current implementation may be from template; breaking changes

actions.action: Reduce mobile checkout to 3 steps: dates+room, guest info, payment. Consolidate optional fields (marketing consent, dietary preferences) post-booking.
actions.tradeoff: Some marketing/operations info shifts post-booking; trade-off worth it

hosp_rate_parity.problem_signal: budget_optimizer agents choose OTA over direct due to price gap

actions.action: Enforce direct-rate parity or advantage across all OTA partners. Implement automated rate-parity monitoring that alerts when OTA rate is cheaper.
actions.tradeoff: Contract renegotiation with OTA partners; short-term OTA volume impact possible

actions.action: Add a 'Why book direct?' module next to the rate: no booking fees, free cancellation until X, room selection, loyalty points. Quantify each benefit in currency or value terms.

hosp_luxury_brand_dilution.problem_signal: luxury_seeker agents note promotional banners or brand mixing cheapening premium positioning

actions.action: Segment promotional banners by logged-in tier and inferred intent. Luxury/Platinum segments should never see mass-market promos.
Create brand-exclusive landing experiences for Paradisus / Gran Meliá / ME that do not cross-promote mid-tier brands (Sol, TRYP).

hosp_wifi_workspace_disclosure.problem_signal: digital_nomad / business_traveler agents require wifi specifics and workspace

actions.action: Publish actual wifi bandwidth (Mbps up/down) on each room type. Add 'remote work ready' badge for rooms with desk, ergonomic chair, and verified connection.
actions.tradeoff: Requires actual testing + maintaining data; opens you up to reviews if performance drops

hosp_cancellation_timezone_clarity.problem_signal: agents express anxiety about cancellation deadlines

actions.action: Display cancellation deadline as 'Cancel free before Wed 12 June 18:00 Madrid time (19:00 your local time)' in booking confirmation and MyBookings.

hosp_upsell_cadence.problem_signal: honeymooner/luxury_seeker agents overwhelmed by pre-stay upsell emails

actions.action: Cap pre-stay emails to max 2 per booking + 1 arrival-day reminder. Consolidate all ancillary offers into a single 'Customize your stay' page linked from those emails.
actions.tradeoff: Short-term ancillary revenue dip possible; offset by higher NPS and repeat bookings

actions.action: Trigger premium guest celebration detection (honeymoon/anniversary/proposal) at booking and pipe to operations with a single handshake — not multiple separate offers.
actions.tradeoff: Requires operations process change; aligns with luxury brand standards

hosp_portfolio_navigation.problem_signal: brand_aware agents confused by sub-brand overlap in search

actions.action: Add a portfolio filter on search: 'Show luxury only (Gran Meliá, Paradisus, ME)', 'Business (INNSIDE)', 'Leisure (Sol)'. Apply at homepage destination search.
actions.tradeoff: Requires brand taxonomy sign-off from marketing

hosp_accessibility_disclosure.problem_signal: agents requesting actual accessibility specs not present on booking page

actions.action: Publish detailed accessible room specs: door width, roll-in shower, visual alarms, grab bars, turning radius, roll-under sink. One diagram per accessible room type.
actions.tradeoff: Accessibility content effort; improves ADA/EAA compliance posture
